title: Bannon Engine Subsystem Registry
description: Canonical list of registered subsystems, types, and APIs to prevent duplication.

systems.name: ECreationCategory
systems.description: Defines 12 structural categories for the superstar and arena creation suites (Superstar_Body, Face, Hair, Torso, Masks, Clothing, Accessories, Moveset_Library, Arena_Barricade, Arena_Ramp, Arena_Tron, Entrance_Sequence).

systems.name: EUnlockState
systems.description: Enumerates item progression states (Locked, Unlocked, DLC).

systems.name: FCreationItemRow
systems.description: Represents a single catalog item row for the character builder DataTable. Contains ItemID, Category, Subcategory, DisplayName, ThumbnailIcon soft pointer, AssetRef soft pointer, UnlockState, SlotIndex, and layering permission flag.

systems.name: UCreationPartAsset
systems.description: Primary Data Asset for granular customization elements including skeletal meshes, material variant instances, layering limit overrides, and slot tag filters.

systems.name: UMovesetLibraryAsset
systems.description: Moveset entry defining MoveID, PositionGroup (Standing, Running, Corner, Ground, etc.), MoveClass (Strike, Grapple, Finisher, etc.), AnimMontage reference, and stamina requirements. Moves are state-gated by RequiredOpponentState, RequiredFacing, RequiredLocation, and DirectionalVariant.

systems.name: FEquippedItem
systems.description: Data representation of an active apparel or accessory layer on a superstar, containing ItemID, LayerOrder, ColorOverride (FLinearColor), and material Opacity.

systems.name: FCreationSaveProfile
systems.description: Full character design state save payload: ProfileID, Map of SliderValues (Head_Size, etc.), Array of EquippedItems, Map of MovesetSlots, and PoseID.

systems.name: Active Ragdoll System
systems.description: Blends kinematic keyframe animation data with skeletal ragdoll simulation constraints. Manages non-canned high-impact move reactions, localized torque, environmental impact scaling, and fall momentum modifications.

systems.name: Interceptive Air-Collisions
systems.description: Calculates real-time combat vectors when striking characters who are in mid-air or diving. Computes falling velocity vectors and applies reactive torque on bone targets.

systems.name: GORO_RIG Layer Bindings
systems.description: Unreal Engine AnimInstance bone-scaling transformations mapping client-driven React slider states directly to bone scale parameters: Head_Size, Neck_Width, Shoulder_Width, Chest_Scale, Waist_Scale, Arm_Thickness, Leg_Thickness.

systems.name: BANNON_AI_DNA Behavior Weights
systems.description: 7-axis weight behavior system (aggression, defense, range, grapple, risk, patience, showmanship) derived programmatically from OTTR_DNA natural language prose. Sub-system maps 1-to-1 to Unreal Engine SubTraits as Gameplay Tags (e.g., aggression:0.85).

systems.name: Damage & Injury Persistence (OTTR_DNA)
systems.description: Tracks cumulative skeletal limb damage and triggers unique gaits, sways, cadences, and limps (e.g., altering locomotion due to leg damage) dynamically throughout matches.

systems.name: Combat Stun Meter
systems.description: Tracks daze/stun threshold. Filled from consecutive light attacks, disabling defensive actions and reversal windows upon reaching capacity.

systems.name: Dynamic Reversal Actions
systems.description: Implements five distinct defensive layers: Tap-reversal, Breakers, Block/Guard, Dodge, and mid-move reversal counters.

systems.name: Technical Chain Wrestling Lock-ups
systems.description: Technical lock-up mini-game exchanging standard positions and advantages via joystick or key sequences at match start.

systems.name: Drag & Carry Mechanic
systems.description: Handles grab-and-drag (ground) and standing grab-and-carry positions. Connects physics pivots to drag opponents to ropes, turnbuckles, barriers, and tables.

systems.name: Combat Drive System
systems.description: Allows players to push or drive an opponent mid-sequence into weapons, ringside posts, guardrails, and tables.

systems.name: Mem0 Universal Memory
systems.description: Passive extraction, cross-session conversation storage.

systems.name: Letta Agent Runtime
systems.description: OS-inspired autonomous memory management.

systems.name: Aider CLI
systems.description: CLI pair programming and repository map traversal.

systems.name: OpenHands
systems.description: Sandboxed autonomous terminal/build environment.

systems.name: Repomix
systems.description: Context payload packing for LLMs.

systems.name: Create-a-Finisher
systems.description: Stitched-together move segments.

systems.name: Create-a-Story
systems.description: Campaign builder tied to OTTR fiction.

systems.name: Fighting-Style Archetypes
systems.description: Changes available moves and passive stats.

systems.name: Universe Mode
systems.description: Dynamic, ongoing wrestling calendar management.

systems.name: Career Mode
systems.description: Superstar progression through ranked hierarchies.

systems.name: The God Within Mode
systems.description: High-concept narrative mode.

systems.name: GM/Booking Mode
systems.description: Management and rating-based booking simulator.

systems.name: Backyard Wrestling
systems.description: Low-budget, hardcore arena environments and rules.

systems.name: Sandbox Exploration
systems.description: MDickie-style free-roaming environment interactions.

systems.name: Backstage/Arena Transitions
systems.description: Seamless transition system between combat zones (Arena/Backstage/Crowd).

systems.name: Bannon Deep Orchestrator
systems.description: A recursive Python orchestration layer that enforces AAA architectural limits, parses this registry to prevent duplicates, and bridges local files to GitHub bypassing standard git constraints via raw REST calls.
